私が追っている海賊、見つかったんですか！？: Have you found the pirate I have been tracking?!
ええ。手配書の男と思われるお客様が<br>頻繁に娼館を利用しているみたいなの。:
Yes. It seems a customer matching the man on the wanted poster has
been frequenting the brothel.
まさか商船を襲って得たお金で好き放題しているなんて <br>絶対に許せません……:
To think he's spending the money from raiding merchant ships as he
pleases... I will never forgive him!
私がこの手で捕まえてみせます！ <br>ルディアさん、ここで待ち伏せさせてくださ:
I will catch him with my own hands! Please let me lie in wait here,
Ludia!
それが用心深い男のようで、<br>兵士や騎士がいると絶対に姿をみせないのよ。:
But he's a cautious man. If he sees soldiers or guards, he'll never
show his face.
特にその格好、エルドラーナ共和国警備隊の制服を見れば<br>２度とここに来ること:
Especially in that outfit—if he spots the Eldorana Republic Guard
uniform, he'll never come here again.
そ、そうですね、この制服は目立ちますから……。: R-right, I suppose... this uniform does stand out.
ですが変装をするのも危険でしょう。<br>相手は仮にも海賊、慣れない装備で挑むの:
But disguising myself is dangerous too. He's a pirate, after all—I'd
rather not face him with unfamiliar gear.
もしも取り逃がしてしまえば、 <br>次に尻尾をつかめるのはいつになるか……: If I let him get away, who knows when I'll get another lead...
絶対に逃げられない場所で、確実に隙を見せる瞬間を狙わないと。 <br>いったいど:
I need to catch him off guard in a place he can't possibly escape
from... What should I do...
……ではカーラさん、この娼館の従業員として、 <br>接客用の個室で待ち伏せると:
In that case, Carla, how about you ambush him in one of our private
rooms, as an employee of this brothel?
２人だけの空間であればチャンスは多いはず。 <br>特にプレイ後の男性は隙だらけ:
In a private room with you two, you'll have many chances. Men are
especially vulnerable after a session—easy to capture, don't you think?
個室で……！<br>それなら確実に捕まえることができそうですね！: A private room...! That way I could definitely catch him!
ですが、その……私がここで働く、ということですよね……？: But, um... that would mean me working here, right...?
もちろんそうなるわね。接客に不審な点があれば疑われるから、 <br>しっかりと研:
Of course it would. If anything about your service seems off, he'll
become suspicious, so you'll need proper training.
うう、あの海賊を捕まえるには必要なことで……、 <br>でも私は……どうしよう…:
*whimper*... It's necessary to catch that pirate... but I... What am I
going to do...
……ちなみに研修については、司令官君にお願いするつもりよ。: ... By the way, I intend to ask the Commander to handle your training.
ええっ！？ <br>司令官が私に研修を……！？: What! The Commander is going to train me...!
っ……私は共和国警備隊として厳しい訓練に耐えてきました。<br>司令官が自ら研修:
... I've endured harsh training as a Republic Guard. If the Commander
himself will train me, there's no way I'll back down.
